en: Maui was struck from the sky, never to be seen again.
ko: 마우이는 하늘에서 떨어져 다시는 볼 수 없었단다.

en: And his magical fishhook and the heart of Te Fiti
ko: 그리고 그의 마법 낚시바늘과 테 피티의 심장은

en: were lost to the sea,
where even now, a thousand years later,
Te Ka and the demons of the deep still hunt for the heart,
ko: 테 카와 심해의 악마들은 여전히 심장을 찾고 있단다,

en: hiding in a darkness that will continue to spread,
chasing away our fish, draining the life from island after island
ko: 물고기를 쫓아내고 섬에서 섬으로 생명을 빨아들이며

en: until every one of us
is devoured by the bloodthirsty jaws
of inescapable death!
But one day, the heart will be found
by someone who will journey beyond our reef,
find Maui, deliver him across the great ocean
to restore Te Fiti's heart and save us all.
ko: 테 피티의 심장을 돌려놓고 우리 모두를 구할 거란다.

en: Oh, oh, oh, thank you, Mother, that's enough. Papa!
No one goes outside the reef. We are safe here.
ko: 아무도 산호초 밖에 나가면 안 돼. 여기가 안전해.

en: There is no darkness. There are no monsters.
Monsters! Monsters! There are no monsters! No monsters! Hey!
ko: 괴물! 괴물! 괴물은 없어! 없다고! 야!

en: No, there is nothing beyond our reef but storms and rough seas.
ko: 아니, 산호초 너머엔 폭풍과 거친 바다뿐이야.

en: As long as we stay on our very safe island, we'll be fine.
ko: 우리가 이 안전한 섬에 있는 한 괜찮아.

en: The legends are true. Someone will have to go.
Mother, Motunui is paradise.
Who would want to go anywhere else?
For generations, this peaceful island has been home to our families.
ko: 수 세대에 걸쳐 이 평화로운 섬은 우리 가족의 터전이었다.

en: But beyond our reef, a great danger is coming.
ko: 하지만 산호초 너머에 큰 위험이 다가오고 있다.

en: Legend tells of a hero who will journey to find the demigod Maui.
ko: 전설에 따르면 영웅이 반신 마우이를 찾아 여행을 떠나고

en: And together, they will save us all.
ko: 함께 우리 모두를 구할 거라 했다.

en: Maui! A boat!
A boat!
Maui, shapeshifter, demigod of the wind and sea,
ko: 마우이, 변신의 신, 바람과 바다의 반신,

en: I am a... Hero of men. What?
It's actually Maui, shapeshifter, demigod of the wind and sea, hero of men.
ko: 정확히는 마우이, 변신의 신, 바람과 바다의 반신, 인간의 영웅이야.

en: I interrupted. From the top. Hero of men. Go.
I'm not going on a mission with some little girl.
ko: 어린 여자애랑 임무 수행 안 해.

en: This is my canoe, and you will journey to different...
ko: 이건 내 카누야, 테 피티로 갈 거야...

en: Did not see that coming. The ocean is a friend of mine.
ko: 그건 예상 못 했네. 바다는 내 친구거든.

en: First, we've got to go through a whole ocean of bad.
ko: 먼저 나쁜 것들로 가득한 바다를 건너야 해.

en: Kakamora. Kaka what? They're kind of cute.
Maui! I got your back.
It's Maui time!
Really? Blow dart in my butt cheek.
We're going to the realm of monsters? Don't worry.
ko: 괴물들의 세계로 가는 거야? 걱정 마.

en: It's a lot farther down than it looks.
I am still falling!
